positive: Minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) with flowing, stylized tails, standing against a deep, cosmic indigo background. The composition is highly centered and symmetrical. The fox should have geometric detailing and ethereal, glowing outlines of neon teal and pale gold light. Incorporate constellations and stylized, geometric moon phases as background elements, giving a sense of depth. Flat vector style, clean lines, negative space emphasized, highly detailed linework suitable for screen printing, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing.
